name: LoopMe
description: AI-powered mobile and video ad platform optimizing brand advertising performance and in-app monetization.

seo.title: LoopMe — Ad Monetization / Mediation
seo.meta_description: LoopMe: AI-powered mobile and video ad platform optimizing brand advertising performance and in-app monetization.

when_to_use: AI-optimized in-app brand advertising for mobile publisher monetization
Video ad performance optimization with outcome-based brand campaign measurement
CTV and mobile video brand campaign delivery with attention metrics
Premium brand demand for mobile app publishers beyond performance DSPs

pros: AI optimization tuned to brand outcomes
cons: Brand focus means less performance-DSP depth
Smaller in-app supply than pure performance DSPs
Measurement relies on LoopMe's own stack
review.verdict: Decent AI-driven brand DSP, but performance marketers have better specialized options elsewhere.
review.best_for: Brand advertisers running mobile video campaigns with outcome measurement goals.
review.not_for: Pure performance UA teams focused on CPI or ROAS optimization.
